edition: Nirṇayasāgara Press 1931, ed. Raghunātha Kāśīnātha Śāstrī, with Nayana-Prasādinī commentary of Pratyagsvarūpa-Bhagavān

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Four paricchedas across 412 pages; ground-truth count via Phase 2 segmentation

ground_truth_source: No mature digital comparator; SARIT and GRETIL hold partial texts only.
first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~560): high-DPI scan. Producer 'BookChanger 4.6.3' typical of recent high-quality archive.org uploads.
ocr_friendliness_notes: Nirṇayasāgara 1931 typesetting is among the cleanest of pre-WWII Sanskrit printing. Two-text layout (mūla + Nayana-Prasādinī) requires region segmentation.
ia_filename: Tattva Pradipika Chitsukhi of Chitsukhacharya with Commentary Nayana Prasadini by Raghunath Kashinath Shastri 1931 - Nirnay Sagar Press.pdf
